text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One morning, I catch sight of Special Week as
she's on her way to class.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Mmm... I need to think more about positioning... Yaaawn.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?! The race... It was all a dream...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sigh. I've been thinking nonstop about the race... And it kept me up late again... Yaaawn.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Special Week is having trouble
sleeping. I need to take that into consideration.
